channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Delhi Police Shifts Activist Sonam Wangchuk to Hospital Amid Hunger Strike
item.description: Activist Sonam Wangchuk, who has been on an indefinite hunger strike for 21 days, was shifted to a hospital by Delhi Police on July 18, 2026, citing deteriorating health conditions. The Delhi High Cou...

item.title: Veteran Radio Presenters Gidi and Ghost Celebrate 18 Years of Morning Show Success
item.description: Veteran radio presenter Gidi Ogidi has celebrated his long-time co-host Jacob 'Ghost' Mulee's 61st birthday, marking 18 years of collaboration on their popular morning show, Gidi na Ghost Asubuhi. The...

item.title: Wife objects to medical treatment for Sonam Wangchuk without consent
item.description: The Delhi Police shifted activist Sonam Wangchuk to Safdarjung Hospital, prompting his wife Gitanjali Angmo to demand consent for any medical treatment. She stated that no procedures should be adminis...

item.title: Congress Faces Backroom Deal to Merge U.S. and Israeli Military Capabilities
item.description: The article details concerns raised by Dennis Kucinich about a covert provision in the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) that could integrate U.S. and Israeli military technologies without pub...

item.title: Parents advised to safeguard children from abuse
item.description: The article highlights the importance of parents taking proactive measures to prevent child abuse. It emphasizes the need for heightened awareness and vigilance within families to ensure children's sa...

item.title: DSWD Launches Expanded UPLIFT Cash Aid Program for 7.5 Million Households
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) announced the start of the expanded United Package for Livelihoods, Industry, Food, and Transport (UPLIFT) cash aid distribution on Monday, targ...

item.title: Oyo teacher explains 56-day kidnapping ordeal, dispels staged claims
item.description: A rescued Oyo teacher, Zachery Olatunde, has shared the harrowing details of his 56-day captivity after armed men abducted 44 pupils and teachers from three schools in Oyo State. He revealed that kidn...

item.title: US launches sustained strikes against Iranian military targets amid escalating regional tensions
item.description: The article details a series of intensified military actions between the United States and Iran, with US forces conducting airstrikes on critical infrastructure in Iran. Key incidents include the dest...

item.title: Chicago White Sox defeat Toronto Blue Jays 12-4 in game
item.description: The Chicago White Sox secured a decisive 12-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays on Friday night, extending their winning streak to four games. Sam Antonacci contributed a two-run home run, while Brad...

item.title: Kenya's Forex Reserves Hit KSh 1.83 Trillion, Covering Six Months of Imports
item.description: Kenya's foreign exchange reserves increased to USD 14.169 billion (KSh 1.83 trillion) as of July 16, 2026, providing six months of import cover, according to the Central Bank of Kenya (CBK). This mark...

item.title: Tanzania Recognized for SDG Achievements at UN Forum
item.description: The article highlights Tanzania's recognition at a United Nations forum for its progress in achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This acknowledgment underscores the nation's efforts in ...

item.title: US president criticises Canada over wildfire smoke impact and compensation demands
item.description: US President Donald Trump has accused Canada of failing to manage its forests, leading to wildfires that have spread toxic smoke across the United States. The situation has prompted warnings for resid...

item.title: UST and SJI-Bacolod Battle for Shakey's Juniors Championship
item.description: The article reports on the volleyball showdown between the University of Santo Tomas (UST) Junior Tigresses and St. John's Institute-Bacolod (SJI-Bacolod) in the Shakey's Juniors National Invitational...

item.title: Team Nigeria Receives Enhanced Welfare Support Ahead of Commonwealth Games with Amusan's Leadership
item.description: Team Nigeria is set to benefit from improved welfare support ahead of the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow. The National Sports Commission has unveiled a comprehensive package that includes higher a...

item.title: River Range Ranch Commits to Co-operation Amid Verulam Building Collapse Investigations
item.description: The River Range Ranch has expressed deep condolences to the families and individuals affected by the tragic collapse of a structure near the New Ahobilam Temple in December 2025. The organization emph...

item.title: Ann Widdecombe's relationship with Maltby and her political career: A reflection on love, loss, and legacy
item.description: The article explores Ann Widdecombe's brief but significant romantic relationship with Maltby during their time at Oxford University in the early 1970s. Despite initial compatibility and shared experi...

item.title: DHS Secretary Mullin's Election Mandate Threats Face Strong Criticism Over Lack of Authority
item.description: U.S. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin faced widespread criticism for his recent threats to mandate sweeping election reforms, including requiring states to 'scrub' voter roll...

item.title: Workers in Remote Alaska Face Unique Challenges Amid Unending Summer Sun
item.description: The article describes a visit to Deadhorse, Alaska, located north of the Arctic Circle, where workers experience extreme environmental conditions. During a summer solstice visit in July 2026, the auth...

item.title: Access Issue: Blocked as a Crawler Bot on News Corp Website
item.description: News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. If you're encountering this message and are not a crawler bot (e.g., a reader or subscriber), follow these s...

item.title: Morogoro Road and Bridge Projects Aim to Stimulate Economic Growth
item.description: The article discusses ongoing infrastructure development projects in Morogoro, Tanzania, focusing on road and bridge construction aimed at boosting the local economy. These initiatives are part of bro...
